i mean，idk any pvp cardgame which have luck factor cannot win by luck

i totally agree that luck cannot be the main factor of a game which has rank
but in my experience，traphase is a low luck game by compare
Almost no wheel for first 3~4 turns
You can't play buff cards because they have dispel
And then you see what they manage to do
Full wheel in less than 3 turns
Every "random hit" card hit the same unit to kill it
If you think "i can wait until i get the wheel"
They can just go clem + magic hat
Force you to draw then exalt so it discard every wheel you just drew
just what i said，some similar stuff will happen in any pvp card game
